ddls:
CREATE TABLE "relays" (
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relay */,
  "type_of_mounting" TEXT /* Type of mounting method (e.g., Directly Operated, None) */,
  "relay_range" TEXT /* Range of the relay in amperes (A) */,
  "cat_no" TEXT /* Catalog number of the relay */,
  "m_r_p" TEXT /* Maximum Retail Price (M.R.P.) per unit in currency */,
  "std_pkg" INTEGER /* Standard packaging quantity (number of units per package) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the relay */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the relay is stored */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the relay */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the relay */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the relay in days */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification information (e.g., UL, CE) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the relay was added to the inventory */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last quality control inspection */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the last quality control inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relays_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relays_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "credit_limit" TEXT /* Credit limit for the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms (e.g., Net 30, Net 60) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for deliveries from the supplier */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Supplier rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase order from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse (e.g., City, Country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the warehouse */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relay */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the relay */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a purchase order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level to avoid stockouts */,
  "last_purchase_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase order for the relay */,
  "next_expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of the next delivery */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the relay in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_relay_id FOREIGN KEY ("relay_id") REFERENCES relays ("relay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the purchase order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the purchase order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the purchase order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order detail */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order */,
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relay */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the relay ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the relay */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the ordered quantity */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the ordered relay */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the ordered relay */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status (e.g., Delivered, In Transit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_relay_id FOREIGN KEY ("relay_id") REFERENCES relays ("relay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control check */,
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relay */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the inspection was conducted */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the quality check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the inspector */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Detailed test results */,
  "certified" INTEGER /* Whether the relay is certified */,
  "reinspection_required" INTEGER /* Whether a reinspection is required */,
  "reinspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next reinspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_relay_id FOREIGN KEY ("relay_id") REFERENCES relays ("relay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the inspector (e.g., ISO, ASQ) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the inspector */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, operator, inspector) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Procurement, Quality Control) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed (e.g., add, delete, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
